sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الشَّاعِرُ أَنْ يَجْلِسَ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ الْوَاسِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik voli sjediti u prostranom vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: The poet loves to sit in the wide garden.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَكْتُبُ قَصَائِدَ جَمِيلَةً عَنِ الْأَزْهَارِ وَالْأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: On piše lijepe pjesme o cvijeću i drveću.
sentences.translationEn: He writes beautiful poems about flowers and trees.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّاعِرُ كَلِمَاتٍ بَسِيطَةً لِيَصِفَ جَمَالَ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik koristi jednostavne riječi kako bi opisao ljepotu prirode.
sentences.translationEn: The poet uses simple words to describe the beauty of nature.

sentences.arabic: فِي قَصِيدَتِهِ، الشَّمْسُ مِثْلُ الذَّهَبِ الَّذِي يُضِيءُ الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: U njegovoj pjesmi, sunce je poput zlata koje obasjava svijet.
sentences.translationEn: In his poem, the sun is like gold that lights up the world.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ شِعْرَهُ وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju njegovu poeziju i osjećaju sreću i mir.
sentences.translationEn: People read his poetry and feel happiness and comfort.
